节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: List is implemented based on the singly linked list. Each node has a reference pointing to the next element. When querying an element, the system traverses the list from the beginning. List offers efficient insertion and removal operations but supports low query efficiency. List allows null elements.
A constructor used to create a List instance.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200012 - The List's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

error_codes.description: The List's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The add method cannot be bound.
节点.return_description: the boolean type, returns true if the addition is successful, and returns false if it fails.
